fault_type: server_error server_error_ratio error error_ratio dns http.resp.status 302
symptom_vector: DNS lookup failure, DNS resolution timeout, incorrect DNS response, DNS server unreachable, truncated DNS packet causing cartservice unavailability

expert_knowledge.root_cause_desc: Component [checkoutservice-0] experienced [server_error, server_error_ratio, error, error_ratio, dns, http.resp.status, 302] fault.
reasoning_chain: Step 1: Check Metadata - Confirm faulty component is [checkoutservice-0] (From Ground Truth instance field)
Step 2: Check Observation - Found keyword [latency_anomalies] in Trace (From GT key_observations: trace subtype)
Step 3: Check Observation - Found keyword [failure] in Log (From GT key_observations: log keyword)
Step 4: Check Observation - Found keyword [http.resp.status, 302] in Log (From GT key_observations: log keyword)
Step 5: Check Observation - Found keyword [Internal] in Log (From GT key_observations: log keyword)
Step 6: Check Observation - Found keyword [request error] in Log (From GT key_observations: log keyword)
Step 7: Check Observation - Found keyword [rpc, error] in Log (From GT key_observations: log keyword)
Step 8: Check Observation - Found keyword [transport, Error, while, dialing] in Log (From GT key_observations: log keyword)
Step 9: Check Observation - Found keyword [unavailable] in Log (From GT key_observations: log keyword)
Step 10: Check Observation - Found keyword [error, error_ratio, server_error, server_error_ratio] in Metric (From GT key_observations: metric keyword)
Step 11: Derive Root Cause - Based on above features, determined cause is [server_error, server_error_ratio, error, error_ratio, dns, http.resp.status, 302] (From Ground Truth key_metrics)

critical_checks.instruction: Search for latency anomalies in trace data for checkoutservice-0 calling cartservice

critical_checks.expected_pattern: Log entries containing 'cart failure: failed to get user cart during checkout'
critical_checks.instruction: Search for keyword 'failure' in logs related to checkoutservice-0

critical_checks.expected_pattern: HTTP response status codes in log messages

critical_checks.expected_pattern: Log messages with 'message': 'request error' in frontend logs
critical_checks.instruction: Search for keyword 'request error' in log messages

critical_checks.expected_pattern: Log entries containing 'rpc error: code = Unavailable desc = connection error'
critical_checks.instruction: Search for keywords 'rpc' and 'error' together in logs
